commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The PR is protected by maintainer/MEMBER ownership and has no narrow automated repair; the remaining action is maintainer review and any desired live proof before landing.; Cleared: The diff is limited to Gateway/doctor diagnostic TypeScript and tests; I found no new dependency, workflow, credential storage, permission, or supply-chain surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds probe-based Gateway credentials-required diagnostics to `openclaw health` and doctor, shares the reachability classifier, reuses Gateway connection/TLS resolution, and updates focused tests.

PR surface: Source +129, Tests +203. Total +332 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection, but not from a live run: current main calls authenticated Gateway health/status RPCs before any unauthenticated probe, so the credential guard can surface as the raw health failure described by the linked issue.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is protected by maintainer/MEMBER ownership and has no narrow automated repair; the remaining action is maintainer review and any desired live proof before landing.
